practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the trie-building clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for inserting, exact search, and prefix search in a trie.
hints: Insert builds missing nodes one letter at a time.
Exact search checks both the path and the word end.
Prefix search only needs the path.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main trie-building clues.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck what insert, exact search, and prefix search each care about.
